items.title: Puri Rath Yatra: Several devotees rescued as crowds surge at Singhadwara

items.title: The Essentials About Mykhailo Fedorov, the Ousted Ukrainian Minister
items.summary: Mr. Fedorov became the youthful face of Ukraine’s successful drone warfare program. The move to replace him has prompted street protests.
